message:
test(io_internal): add comprehensive NativeFile layout tests (bd-9chy.46)

Add 53 unit tests verifying:
- Field-offset assertions for all _IO_FILE fields matching glibc 2.34
- NativeFile size <= 4096 (slab compatibility)
- NativeFile alignment >= pointer alignment
- vtable at offset 216 (end of _IO_FILE region)
- _frankenlibc_state positioned after vtable
- mbstate_t zeroed (C-locale initial state)
- Magic, fingerprint, and orientation default values
- Buffer/flag/chain initialization

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
